C1.descriptionTemplate: Horla obtains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus.{Rouse}: Immediately gain 1 stack of {Metaphor} for each {Emotion} Horla is not currently in. At each turn start, repeat this effect. Each {Emotion} can have a maximum of 3 stacks of {Metaphor}. When Psalm cards trigger {Leap}, consume all {Metaphor} stacks of that {Emotion} to trigger the corresponding effects.

C2.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG. Horla obtains [Energy:Arg3] Aliemus. Considered as a "Strike". {Leap}: Switch {Emotion} state to {Anger}. For each stack of {Anger} {Metaphor} consumed, deal an additional 2 instances of DMG.

C3.descriptionTemplate: Obtain [Block:Arg1] Shield. Horla obtains [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus. Considered as a "Defense".{Leap}: Switch {Emotion} state to {Grief}. For each stack of '{Grief}' {Metaphor} consumed, restore [Heal:Arg3] HP.

C4.descriptionTemplate: Choose 1 other Awakener to gain [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Leap}: Switch {Emotion} state to {Happiness}. For each stack of {Happiness} {Metaphor} consumed, increase the amount of Aliemus granted by [Energy:Arg2].

C5.descriptionTemplate: Gain [Power:Arg1] {STR}. Temporarily reduce all enemies' {STR⯆} by [Exhaustion:Arg2]. {Leap}: Switch {Emotion} state to {Fear}. For each stack of {Fear} {Metaphor} consumed, gain an additional [Power:Arg3] {STR}.

Exalt.descriptionTemplate: Restore [Heal:Arg1] HP, obtain [Power:Arg2] {STR}. Other Awakeners gain [Energy:Arg3] Aliemus. All Awakeners Temporary Crit. Rate and Crit. DMG +[Arg4]%. If Horla is currently under an {Emotion} state, improve the effect provided by {Resplendent Chapters} corresponding to the {Emotion} state by 150%.

OverExalt.descriptionTemplate: Further increase the {Emotion} state bonus effect to 600%. Obtain 3 stacks of universal {Metaphor}, which can be treated as a {Metaphor} of any {Emotion}. Universal {Metaphor} takes priority for being consumed when a {Leap} effect is triggered.

T1.descriptionTemplate:
Horla's "Strike" and "Defend" Command Cards are treated as Psalms.
When Horla's Command Cards trigger their {Leap} Effect, she enters the {Emotion} state associated with that Psalm. Horla can only have one {Emotion} state active at a time, and triggering a different Psalm's {Leap} Effect will change the {Emotion} state to the corresponding {Emotion}. Each {Emotion} has a team-wide passive buff that is active while Horla remains in that {Emotion}. Each {Emotion} state enhances a different effect of Horla's Exalt. The {Emotion} state persists throughout the exploration.
For every 1% {Death Resistance} Horla has, the passive effect value of Horla's current {Emotion} state increases by 0.1% of the original value.

T2.descriptionTemplate: Obtain [Arg1] Aliemus after the start of exploration.

T3.descriptionTemplate:
This talent is only effective in the {Astral Reign} stages.
This Awakener's CON, ATK, and DEF are increased by [Arg1]%, and they gain [Arg2] Keyflare upon their first {Rouse}.
At the start of Boss Battles, gain {Death Resistance} equal to [Arg3]% of Horla's {Death Resistance} attribute. Each time {Death Resistance} is triggered, the corresponding {Emotion} effect of {Resplendent Chapters} +[Arg4]% until turn end.

E1.descriptionTemplate:
{Snarl Psalm}: Applies 1 stack of {Vulnerable} to all enemies.
{Elegy Psalm}: Applies 1 stack of {Weakness} to all enemies.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG. Horla obtains [Energy:Arg3] Aliemus. Inflict 1 stack of {Vulnerable} on all enemies. Considered as a "Strike". {Leap}: Switch {Emotion} state to {Anger}. For each stack of {Anger} {Metaphor} consumed, deal an additional 2 instances of DMG.

Obtain [Block:Arg1] Shield. Horla obtains [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus. Inflict 1 stack of {Weakness} on all enemies. Considered as a "Defense". {Leap}: Switch to the {Grief} {Emotion} state. For each stack of {Grief} {Metaphor} consumed, restore [Heal:Arg3] HP.

E3.descriptionTemplate:
Each time the first "Psalm" is played in a turn, Horla gains 10 Aliemus.
Enhance the bonus effect corresponding to the current {Emotion} state when using {Resplendent Chapters} from 150% to 250%.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Restore [Heal:Arg1] HP, obtain [Power:Arg2] {STR}. Other Awakeners gain [Energy:Arg3] Aliemus, Temporary Crit. Rate and Crit. DMG +[Arg4]%. Under different emotions, {Resplendent Chapters}' corresponding effects are enhanced by 250%.
